name: Abandoned Milking Machine
description: This abandoned milking machine lies dormant in the forgotten corners of a once-bustling laboratory, its sleek black exterior adorned with an array of buttons that hint at its advanced capabilities. Designed with precision and care, it was deemed too effective for public use, a prototype ahead of its time. Its unassuming appearance belies the power within; the large black box hides a symphony of sensual wonders.
creator: ElaxHobs
